title: Kitchen Slotted Spoon, 2 Pcs Silicone Slotted Spoon Heat Resistant, Non Scratch Cooking Spoons Set for Stirring, Scooping and Mixing
features: High quality: Choose the highest quality materials to ensure your health. No discoloration, no warpage, no melting. Silicones can withstand temperatures up to 480 ° F
Non-stick pan: High-quality materials prevent the pan from being scratched during cooking. Suitable for all types of cookware and will maximize the life of the cookware
Powerful: Spoons are naturally durable and can be used for up to ten years without any protection or special treatment
Easy to clean: The kitchen spoon set is very easy to clean and can be cleaned by hand or dishwasher. Hanging holes for easy storage
Made from natural materials: Every spoon is well-made and can last for a long time even in daily use. Seamless silicone design prevents spoons from breaking or falling like wooden spoons
